jobs.title: Environmental Health Safety Specialist / Data Collector Operation / Data Operator
jobs.description:
Dice is the leading career destination for tech experts at every stage of their careers. Our client, TATA Consultancy Services Limited, is seeking the following. Apply via Dice today!

Job Title – Environmental Health Safety Specialist
/ Data Collector Operation / Data Operator

Location - 4435 Eastgate mall San Diego CA 92121 (Onsite)

Salary – 50k - 60k + Benefits.

Key Responsibilities

Conduct daily laser safety tests using approved EH&S checklists
Maintain accurate testing logs and compliance records
Monitor hardware systems to ensure safe operation
Identify and escalate safety risks or equipment issues
Enforce strict safety and no-phone policies
Support adherence to SOPs and EH&S standards

Qualifications

Graduate
2+ year experience in safety, lab, or technical operations
Familiarity with workplace safety standards (OSHA preferred)
Strong attention to detail and ability to follow SOPs

Key Skills

Safety compliance & documentation
Strong communication & escalation skills
Ability to work in high-security environments

Requirements

Ability to work rotational/overlapping shifts
Comfortable in controlled, no-phone work zones
Commitment to strict confidentiality and safety protocols

Show more

Show less

Seniority level

Not Applicable

Employment type

Full-time

Job function

Accounting/Auditing and Finance

Industries

Software Development
